summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical is provided; most hydrated candidates are open PRs with security_sensitive=false. #86460 is downgraded to needs_human because deterministic validation requested security routing while the hydrated preflight item explicitly reports security_sensitive=false, so route_security is not safe under the repair rules. No close, merge, fix, or raise_pr action is safe here.
